sources.title: The self-improving loop
conventions: Keep signal, report, investigation, reviewed change, delivery, and measurement distinct

sources.title: AI Observability traces
conventions: Separate sessions, traces, generations, and spans from deterministic product verification

sources.title: Capturing events
conventions: Capture meaningful state changes and use object-verb names for custom events

sources.title: How to write product docs
conventions: Give each document one job and keep one canonical home for current product truth
Use one central navigation in this order: Overview, Getting started, Concepts, Guides, PostHog AI, Resources

sources.title: Install the Node.js SDK for logs
conventions: Use the current technical-doc convention: ingestion project tokens start with phc_; reject phx_ personal API keys. This overrides the inconsistent phs_ row in the docs style guide

sources.title: How to use the content writer agent
conventions: Keep technical accuracy with executable product owners even when automation helps draft prose

sources.title: Context Mill
conventions: Separate source, deterministic assembly, versioned delivery, and consumption

sources.title: What we wish we knew before building AI agents
conventions: Use bounded tools, explicit context, durable state, and evidence instead of model confidence

sources.title: We used context engineering to 5x conversion and 2x activation
conventions: Treat context as a versioned product input; no reported numerical result is reused as a TrashPal claim
